files.structure: Uses modern erp-card wrapper with card-header/card-body. No screen-container needed. Grid uses standard Bootstrap col-md-* and col-xl-* with p-table for data. Clean separation of concerns.
action_items: No major changes needed
Already compliant with global design system

files.structure: Uses screen-container/screen-card wrapper instead of module-page/erp-card. Custom tab styling with tab-btn/active-tab instead of nav-tabs. Table styling uses th-cell/td-cell instead of erp-table-th/erp-table-td. Balance card is custom styled.
action_items: REPLACE: screen-container → module-page wrapper
REPLACE: screen-card → erp-card
REPLACE: custom-tabs/tab-btn/active-tab → use Bootstrap nav-tabs or global tab system
REPLACE: table-card → erp-table wrapper
REPLACE: th-cell/td-cell → erp-table-th/erp-table-td
REPLACE: balance-card custom styling → erp-info-card or similar global component
UPDATE: form styling to use erp-form-group consistently

files.structure: Uses screen-container/screen-card wrapper. Has custom filter-col sizing (--sm, --md, --lg) instead of Bootstrap col-*. Custom balance-card component with custom styling. Multiple custom tab styles (nav-tabs-custom). Uses p-table but with many custom th-/td- class prefixes. Custom button styling with btn-- variants.
action_items: REPLACE: screen-container/screen-card → module-page/erp-card
REPLACE: filter-col (--sm, --md, --lg) → Bootstrap col-md-*/col-xl-* consistently
REPLACE: balance-card → erp-info-card or erp-balance-panel
REPLACE: nav-tabs-custom → Bootstrap nav-tabs with global styling
REPLACE: custom badge classes (badge--*) → Bootstrap badge-* or erp-badge-*
REPLACE: th-cell/td-cell/td-center/td-right → erp-table-th/erp-table-td with proper alignment classes
REPLACE: toolbar-row → erp-toolbar or standard Bootstrap grid
REPLACE: brs-date-row/brs-date-col → standard Bootstrap grid
UPDATE: form-control--sm/--right → standard erp-input with helper classes

files.structure:
Currently contains only placeholder text: '

fund-transfer-out works!

'. No actual HTML structure implemented.
action_items: COMPLETE: Build entire component HTML from scratch
DESIGN: Follow patterns from similar transaction components (payment-voucher, journal-voucher, petty-cash)
IMPLEMENT: Use modern erp-* global classes throughout
STRUCTURE: Use module-page → erp-card → content pattern
USE: erp-form-group, erp-label, erp-input for all form elements
USE: erp-btn, erp-badge for buttons and status indicators
USE: Bootstrap grid (row, col-md-*, col-xl-*) for layout
USE: p-table with erp-table-th/erp-table-td for data grids

files.structure: Uses screen-container/screen-card wrapper. Has custom form-section dividers and section-action-bar for button grouping. Complex tax-panel system for GST/TDS with custom gst-mini-card styling. Custom radio-pill for calculation type selection. Field balance display uses custom field-balance-row structure. Form groups are partially using erp-form-group but mixed with custom styling.
action_items: REPLACE: screen-container/screen-card → module-page/erp-card
REPLACE: form-section → standard Bootstrap section dividers or erp-section component
REPLACE: section-action-bar → erp-button-group or standard flexbox with erp-btn
REPLACE: tax-panel/tax-panel-header → erp-panel or erp-collapsible-panel
REPLACE: gst-cards-row/gst-mini-card → erp-info-grid or erp-stat-cards
REPLACE: radio-pill/radio-pill-group → Bootstrap form-check or erp-radio-group
REPLACE: field-balance-row → erp-field-with-label and erp-info-label side by side
REPLACE: material-switch → standard Bootstrap form-switch or erp-toggle
STANDARDIZE: All form groups to use erp-form-group/erp-label/erp-input pattern
REMOVE: border-warning → use erp-input--warning or equivalent

files.structure: Heavily relies on custom styling classes. Uses screen-container/screen-card/screen-body wrappers instead of modern patterns. Toolbar-row instead of erp-toolbar. Custom table styling with col-* classes for column width definitions and th-base/td-base for cell styling. Search input uses custom search-wrapper/search-icon styling. Button styling uses btn-new/btn-view custom classes.
action_items: REPLACE: screen-container/screen-card/screen-body → module-page/erp-card structure
REPLACE: toolbar-row → erp-toolbar or Bootstrap grid with spacing
REPLACE: btn-new → erp-btn btn-primary btn-icon-new (or standard erp-btn styling)
REPLACE: btn-view → standard erp-btn btn-outline-primary or equivalent
REPLACE: search-wrapper/search-icon → erp-search-input component or erp-form-group with icon
REPLACE: table-card → standard erp-table wrapper
REPLACE: col-*/th-base/td-base/td-center/td-right → erp-table-th/erp-table-td with alignment utilities
REMOVE: sort-icon styling → Use PrimeNG p-sortIcon component styling
MODERNIZE: Currency pipe usage and formatting
UPDATE: P-table styling class to use erp-datatable or modern PrimeNG theme

files.structure: Entire file uses custom 'pv-' (payment-voucher) namespace. Every structural element has pv- prefix: pv-container, pv-card, pv-header, pv-content, pv-toolbar, pv-table-wrapper, pv-datatable, pv-row, pv-cell, etc. This is the WORST file for old patterns. No use of erp-card, erp-form-group, or modern global classes. Custom toolbar with pv-search. Custom table with pv-col-* column classes.
action_items: COMPLETE REWRITE: Replace entire pv-* namespace with erp-* global classes
STRUCTURE: module-page → erp-card wrapper instead of pv-container/pv-card
HEADER: Replace pv-header structure with standard erp-card-header
TOOLBAR: Replace pv-toolbar with erp-toolbar component or Bootstrap grid
SEARCH: Replace pv-search with erp-search-input or erp-form-group + erp-input
BUTTONS: Replace pv-btn-primary with erp-btn btn-primary
TABLE: Replace pv-datatable/pv-col-*/pv-row/pv-cell with p-table + erp-table-th/erp-table-td
EMPTY STATE: Replace pv-empty with standard erp-empty-state component
SKELETON: Replace pv-skeleton with p-skeleton (PrimeNG standard)
BADGES: Use erp-badge instead of p-tag where appropriate

files.structure: Like payment-voucher.html, uses extensive pv-* namespace throughout. Custom form layout with pv-card sections. Custom field styling with pv-label/pv-input and many modifiers (--invalid, --readonly, --amount). Custom balance display system with pv-balance-badges and pv-balance-badge-* variants. Radio button styling with pv-mode-option. Only modern aspects are some Bootstrap utilities and erp-btn usage.
action_items: COMPLETE REWRITE: Replace entire pv-* namespace with erp-* and Bootstrap classes
STRUCTURE: Replace pv-screen/pv-shell → module-page wrapper
HEADER: Replace pv-header with standard card-header or erp-page-header
FORMS: Replace pv-card sections with standard Bootstrap sections or erp-section dividers
LABELS: Replace pv-label/pv-label__required with erp-label + required indicator
INPUTS: Replace pv-input and modifiers with erp-input and utility classes
STATES: Use ng-invalid/ng-valid classes with Bootstrap is-invalid for error styling
RADIO BUTTONS: Replace pv-mode-option with Bootstrap form-check or erp-radio-group
BALANCE DISPLAY: Replace pv-balance-badges/pv-balance-badge with erp-badge or custom info component
SELECTS: Replace pv-select with ng-select or erp-select wrapper
ERRORS: Replace pv-error with standard Bootstrap invalid-feedback

files.structure: Uses section-card for form section grouping instead of standard Bootstrap sections. Custom radio-group styling with radio-pill-label instead of Bootstrap form-check. Balance display uses custom balance-badges with color variants (--green, --yellow). Tax system (GST) uses custom tax-box and gst-mini-card components. Custom field layout with field-balance-row and balance-hint. Form errors use custom form-error class. Modal styling is custom. Material switch for tax toggles.
action_items: REPLACE: section-card → Bootstrap alert/section div or erp-section component
REPLACE: section-title → standard heading with Bootstrap utility classes
REPLACE: radio-group/radio-pill-label → Bootstrap form-check with erp-radio styling
REPLACE: balance-badges/balance-badge-* → erp-badge or erp-stat-badge with Bootstrap utility classes
REPLACE: tax-box/tax-box-header → erp-panel or Bootstrap card component
REPLACE: gst-cards-row/gst-mini-card → erp-info-grid or Bootstrap grid
REPLACE: material-switch → Bootstrap form-switch or erp-toggle
REPLACE: field-balance-row → Flex layout with erp-label and balance indicator
REPLACE: form-error → Bootstrap invalid-feedback
REPLACE: modal styling → Use PrimeNG p-dialog or standard Bootstrap modal with erp styling
STANDARDIZE: erp-label vs erp-label-sm → use single erp-label with size utilities

files.structure: Uses screen-container/screen-card wrapper instead of modern module-page/erp-card. Toolbar uses custom toolbar class instead of erp-toolbar. Search uses custom search-wrapper/search-icon instead of erp-search-input. Table uses custom tbl-* class prefix (tbl-header, tbl-cell, tbl-row, tbl-center, tbl-right, tbl-empty) instead of erp-table-th/erp-table-td. Status badges use custom erp-badge-cash styling. Button styling mixes erp-btn with custom btn-icon-view.
action_items: REPLACE: screen-container/screen-card → module-page/erp-card
REPLACE: toolbar → erp-toolbar or Bootstrap grid with appropriate spacing
REPLACE: search-wrapper/search-icon → erp-search-input or erp-form-group + erp-input
REPLACE: btn-new → erp-btn btn-primary btn-icon with pi pi-plus icon
REPLACE: table-wrapper → standard p-table wrapper
REPLACE: tbl-header/tbl-cell/tbl-row → erp-table-th/erp-table-td
REPLACE: tbl-center/tbl-right → Use text-center/text-end Bootstrap utilities on erp-table-td
REPLACE: tbl-empty → Standard empty-message template with erp-empty styling
REPLACE: voucher-badge → erp-badge or erp-badge-primary
REPLACE: erp-badge-cash → erp-badge-success or erp-badge with cash color variant
REPLACE: btn-icon-view → erp-btn btn-icon-only with fa fa-eye
UPDATE: payment-meta → Use erp-text-muted or Bootstrap text-muted for secondary text
UPDATE: amount-value → Use appropriate currency formatting with bootstrap text utility

files.structure: Uses page-wrapper/screen-card instead of module-page/erp-card. Custom section-card dividers instead of Bootstrap sections. Information display uses custom info-row/info-left/info-item/info-label/info-value structure instead of standard Bootstrap list or grid. Table styling uses custom table-header-cell/table-body-row/table-cell pattern instead of erp-table-th/erp-table-td. Summary uses custom summary-row/summary-item structure. Buttons use custom btn-cancel/btn-save styling. Footer uses custom footer-actions.
action_items: REPLACE: page-wrapper/screen-card → module-page/erp-card
REPLACE: section-card → Bootstrap alert or erp-section component
REPLACE: section-title → Standard heading with Bootstrap utilities
REPLACE: field-label + required-star → erp-label with required indicator
REPLACE: info-row/info-left/info-item structure → Bootstrap grid or custom erp-info-list
REPLACE: info-label/info-value → Use flexbox with appropriate text styling
REPLACE: table-* styling → p-table with erp-table-th/erp-table-td
REPLACE: total-row/total-label/total-value → Standard Bootstrap row with font-weight-bold
REPLACE: summary-row/summary-item → Bootstrap grid with proper spacing
REPLACE: btn-cancel → erp-btn btn-secondary or btn-outline-secondary
REPLACE: btn-save → erp-btn btn-primary with loading spinner
REPLACE: btn-show → erp-btn btn-primary btn-sm
REPLACE: footer-actions → Bootstrap d-flex gap-2 with erp-buttons
REPLACE: textarea-control → erp-input with textarea element
UPDATE: invalid-feedback → Bootstrap invalid-feedback styling

files.structure: Uses screen-container/screen-card wrapper instead of module-page/erp-card. Form sections use custom form-panel instead of Bootstrap sections. Field styling uses custom field-label/field-input instead of erp-form-group/erp-label/erp-input pattern. Show button has custom show-btn-wrapper. Empty state uses custom empty-state-box. Table uses custom tbl-* prefix (tbl-header, tbl-cell, tbl-footer-*) instead of erp-table-th/erp-table-td. Textarea uses custom narration-area. Character count uses custom char-count-wrap with char-limit-reached/char-count-normal.
action_items: REPLACE: screen-container/screen-card → module-page/erp-card
REPLACE: form-panel → Bootstrap card or erp-section component
REPLACE: field-label/field-input → erp-label/erp-input within erp-form-group
REPLACE: custom erp-select → Use standard ng-select or erp-form-group wrapper
REPLACE: invalid-feedback → Bootstrap invalid-feedback with proper aria attributes
REPLACE: show-btn-wrapper → Remove wrapper, use erp-btn directly
REPLACE: empty-state-box → erp-empty-state component or Bootstrap alert
REPLACE: tbl-header/tbl-cell/tbl-footer-* → erp-table-th/erp-table-td
REPLACE: tbl-right → Use text-end Bootstrap utility on erp-table-td
REPLACE: tbl-empty-msg → Standard empty-message template with erp-empty styling
REPLACE: narration-area → Standard textarea within erp-form-group
REPLACE: char-count-wrap/char-limit-reached → Use erp-char-count-helper or custom component
REPLACE: action-buttons → d-flex gap-2 with erp-btn buttons
REPLACE: btn-action/btn-secondary → erp-btn btn-secondary for secondary actions
UPDATE: form-error → Use Bootstrap invalid-feedback consistently

Create reusable components for common patterns: erp-toolbar, erp-search-input, erp-empty-state, erp-info-panel

migration_strategy: Phase 1: Migrate payment-voucher files (highest priority, biggest impact)
Phase 4: Migrate petty-cash and transaction-specific files
parallel_opportunities: Files can be migrated in parallel by different team members
